TechCrunch.title: Emil Michael, now a senior Pentagon official, says he’ll never forgive Uber investors who ousted him and Kalanick
TechCrunch.summary: When asked whether he was still "salty" about about being shown the door at Uber, alongside co-founder Travis Kalanick, Michael didn't equivocate. "I'll never forget that, nor forgive," he said.
